about.heading: Born under a northern sky
about.paragraph1: I'm Natalie — a vocalist from Russia, and two worlds live in my voice. One belongs to the golden age: smoky jazz clubs, big-band swing, a rose behind the ear and pearls in the hair. The other belongs to the storm — gothic metal, Nordic folk and the wild, aching songs of the night.
about.paragraph2: I take the songs the world already loves and let them pass through me like moonlight through a forest — they come out changed: quieter, darker, closer. Under the name Northern Sky, I record vocal covers that wander from the 1930s to the edge of midnight.
